pages.raw_text:
OLYMPIA, June SOLICITATIONS
for railroad taxation purposes in
this state have been announced by
the tax commission as follows:
Great Northern s59,000,000, North
ern Pacific Sill 100000, O. r. & n
$16,500,000. The tax rate will be
based on 60 per cent valuation,
making an aggregate assessment of
Sill 100000 on main lines and an
addition for the various branches
that will increase the total to
1925 100000.


These valuations are fixed on the
operating properties of the road,
and the commission is backed by
the sworn estimates of railroad Of
ficials in their testimony before the
commission in justification of the
rates charged for service. County
assessors will follow the usual
course of assessing roadbed and
railroad realty for county purposes.
